title: GTA VI: Hype, Hope and Realism
body: A short note on expectations, trailer archaeology, and trying not to mistake marketing smoke for a weather report.

title: Why Physical Media Still Matters
body: Boxes, discs, manuals and old magazines still carry context that digital storefronts flatten out far too easily.

title: The Legacy of PS2 Magazine
body: A few thoughts on the magazine era when PlayStation 2 coverage could fill entire walls and still need more pages.

title: Revisiting Shenmue in 2025
body: Some games age like design documents, some like places. Shenmue still feels oddly like somewhere you once waited for a bus.

title: Notes from a Gamescom Week
body: Meetings, demos, noise, coffee, and the familiar moment where every appointment is somehow in the opposite hall.
